reviews.comment:
Un desastre me han rayado el auto al lavarlo y lo abollaron en la parte de mecanica aparte que es el taller mas caro que pise en mi vida nada recomendable un desastre

(Translated by Google)
A disaster! They scratched my car while washing it and dented the mechanical parts. Besides that, it's the most expensive garage I've ever been to. Not recommended at all. A complete disaster.

reviews.comment:
El ACA no es lo que era... Este es un taller operado por terceros... sucio, lleno de autos, lentos.

(Translated by Google)
The ACA isn't what it used to be... This is a third-party operated workshop... dirty, full of cars, slow.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNndzVxS0FnEAE

reviews.comment:
Como estación de servicio funciona muy bien. Como taller tuve muchos problemas con los arreglos y estoy muy disconforme. Incluso contesté un mail con una encuesta por su atención. Escribí detalladamente mi reclamo y jamás me contestaron..

(Translated by Google)
As a gas station, it works very well. As a repair shop, I had many problems with the repairs and I'm very dissatisfied. I even answered an email with a survey about their service. I wrote my complaint in detail and they never replied.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURROU0yWWhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
